queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of having no checking account on increasing credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: all previous credits at this bank paid back duly.
queries.question: Investigation into the association between a history of all previous credits paid back duly and elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical relationship between savings account status below 100 DM and decreased credit risk.
